texto: That's it: watch your moods. Don't let people see you fluctuate. Don't let yourself run your mouth. Never ever cry, even alone, because your cat or your kettle might tell. Always smile, but don't laugh loudly. Mania is an extrovert, but if you need to vent, tell your mattress or maybe your therapist, but put nothing in writing and never tell a friend or coworker how you're really feeling. Downplay any problem or joy. Pay attention to any signs that your life is shitty or excellent, because either is an illusion. Be careful around men, especially ones with big arms or opinions. Stop talking.
explicacao: Citação de Elissa Washuta sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “That's it: watch your moods. Don't let people see you fluctuate. Don't let yourself run your mout…” articula amizade, bipolar, bipolar-disorder em registro de amizade, com relevância para contextos como termino e trabalho.
